ttl.name: WIRELESS DOOR LOCK CONTROL SYSTEM (w/o Smart Key System)

atten4.ptxt: The wireless door lock control system troubleshooting procedures are based on the premise that the power door lock control system is operating normally. Check the power door lock control system first before troubleshooting the wireless door lock control system.
Use this procedure to troubleshoot the wireless door lock control system.

test1.ptxt: Interview the customer to confirm the trouble (See page ).

descript-testgroup.testtitle: INSPECT COMMUNICATION FUNCTION OF CAN COMMUNICATION SYSTEM

test1.ptxt: Use the intelligent tester to check for normal function of the multiplex communication system.

test2.ptxt: (ECU unconnected, communication line malfunctioning) If no code is output, proceed to A.
(ECU unconnected, communication line malfunctioning) If any code is output, proceed to B.

test1.ptxt: Check for a DTC and note any codes that are output.
Recheck for DTCs. Try to prompt the DTC by simulating the original symptom that the DTC suggests.

test2.ptxt: If the DTC does not reoccur, proceed to A.
If the DTC reoccurs, proceed to B.

test1.ptxt: If the fault is not listed in the problem symptoms table, proceed to A.
If the fault is listed in the problem symptoms table, proceed to B.

descript-testgroup.testtitle: PERFORM TROUBLESHOOTING ACCORDING TO MALFUNCTION SYMPTOM
